response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience with a focus on testability and modern development practices, but his background lacks direct alignment with embedded firmware security for LAN-switch products. His C/C++ experience is limited and not recent, and there is no evidence of Japanese language proficiency or deep networking/security expertise in embedded systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with a focus on testability and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Proven ability to work across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded systems).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
concerns: Lacks recent and relevant C programming experience, especially in embedded or UNIX environments.
No evidence of Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement.
Limited exposure to networking/security technologies specific to embedded LAN-switch products (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X).
